facts.claim: Carnival Magic is packed with cruise ship fun including delicious food and overthe-top entertainment which you will agree, earns its namesake. See photos, deck plans, staterooms, onboard activities, and itinerary options. Book your Carnival Magic cruise today!
Just like a delicious cake, your ship is made of layers. Find out which fun ingredients — staterooms, dining, activities — go into each deck.
Carnival Magic is a Dream-class cruise ship which entered service on 1 May 2011.
